OB

Olivia Bennett

Online · typing…
Hey Jane! Did you get a chance to look at the v2.4 candidate? 10:38 AM
Just finished going through it. Overall really solid — the new motion primitives are great. 10:40 AM
Glad you like them. Any concerns? 10:40 AM
Two small things: the success state on form inputs feels light, and the focus ring is barely visible on dark theme. 10:41 AM
Yeah, that focus ring issue has been bugging me too. I’ll bump the contrast and ping you for another look. 10:42 AM
Sounds good. Otherwise, ship it! 10:42 AM
Anything you want
